creator: tomdean@speakeasy.org
text:
ports/116166: math/scilab: Scilab 4.1.1 exits with corrupt stack
addressed the lapack problem.  The lapack part of the problem is
fixed.

ports/116777: The math/scilab port fails in demos->signal->bode
is a more scilab specific report.

I still see the messages:
  Scilab : X error trapped - error message follows:
  BadWindow (invalid Window parameter)
